user.title: Connect to Evertz Quartz Router
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your Evertz EQX/EQT router or MAGNUM controller.

detect.title: Detected Router Size
detect.description: Connected to {host}:{port}. The router was probed to detect its size. Review and confirm the values below — you can override them if needed.

data_description.levels: V = video only. Append A, B, C… for audio levels. E.g. VABC switches video + 3 audio levels simultaneously.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect — check the IP address and port.

init.title: Evertz Quartz Debug & Connection Options
init.description: These settings apply immediately — no restart required.

data.verbose_logging: Verbose TCP logging (log every TX/RX message)

data_description.verbose_logging: Logs every raw Quartz frame sent and received at DEBUG level. Useful for troubleshooting but chatty on busy routers.
data_description.reconnect_delay: How long to wait before reconnecting after a connection drop.
data_description.connect_timeout: Maximum time to establish the initial TCP connection.

route.name: Route Source to Destination
route.description: Routes a source to a destination on the Evertz router.

levels.name: Levels
levels.description: Optional level override (e.g. V, VA, VABC). Defaults to the configured levels.
